title: I Tried the Tool Trying to Kill Apache Airflow (Kestra)
summary: Kestra is an open-source workflow orchestration tool designed as a lighter alternative to Apache Airflow. It uses declarative YAML workflows instead of Python DAGs and provides both browser-based UI and code-based configuration for building data pipelines, automation workflows, and scheduled tasks.
writeup: The video walks through Kestra, an open-source workflow orchestration tool positioned as a lighter alternative to Apache Airflow. The distinction that matters: Kestra defines workflows with declarative YAML rather than Python DAGs, and it pairs a browser-based UI with code-based configuration. Coverage spans building data pipelines, automation workflows, and scheduled tasks across both the visual editor and the underlying config.
